purpose: Define a deterministic memory loop for AI session continuity using MemPalace while keeping local handover/state files authoritative.
design_intent: Improve wake-up quality and handover reliability by indexing only working-memory artifacts instead of source code by default.
change_impact: Affects agent startup, checkpoint discipline, and handover consistency; does not change runtime behavior.

authority.conflict_policy: If MemPalace retrieval conflicts with local authority files, local authority files take precedence.

steps: Read state index and referenced handover file.
If MemPalace is unavailable, continue from local authority files only.

checkpoint.cadence: after each micro-task or architectural decision
steps: Update handover draft with what changed, why, blockers, and next action.
Run one retrieval query to verify new context is discoverable.
Mine updated handover and state files.
Verify status/search output contains next action and known blockers.

required: No source-code indexing unless explicitly requested.
No secrets in handovers or mined context.
